---
title: "Duke Football"
author: "Johan Nino Espino"
format: 
  pdf:
    fig-height: 4
    fig-width: 6
---

```{r}

# load any packetges
library(cfbfastR)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}

# load the Duke dataset
pbp <- load_cfb_pbp(2025)
duke_possession <- pbp |>
  filter(pos_team == "Duke")
```

```{r}

# Create play categories
duke_plays <- duke_possession |>
  mutate(
    play_category = case_when(
      play_type == "Rush" ~ "Run",
      grepl("Pass", play_type) ~ "Pass",
      play_type == "Sack" ~ "Pass",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )) |>
  filter(!is.na(play_category))
```

```{r}

# Compute the play categories probabilities
play_probs <- duke_plays |>
  count(play_category) |>
  mutate(prob = n / sum(n))

play_probs
```

```{r}

# Plot the probabilities
ggplot(play_probs, aes(x = play_category, y = prob, fill = play_category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(prob, 3)), vjust = -0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Duke Offense: Run vs Pass Probability",
    x = "Play Type",
    y = "Probability",
    fill = "Play Category") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}

# Ensure state variables exists
duke_plays <- duke_possession |>
  filter(play_type %in% c("Rush", "Pass Reception", "Pass Incompletion", "Sack")) %>%
  mutate(
    play_category = ifelse(play_type == "Rush", "Run", "Pass"),
    distance_bucket = case_when(
      distance <= 3 ~ "short",
      distance <= 7 ~ "medium",
      TRUE ~ "long"
    ),
    field_bucket = case_when(
      yards_to_goal >= 80 ~ "backed_up",
      yards_to_goal >= 50 ~ "own_side",
      yards_to_goal >= 20 ~ "opponent_side",
      TRUE ~ "red_zone"))
```

```{r}

# Compute the probbilities by state
state_probs <- duke_plays %>%
  group_by(down, distance_bucket, field_bucket, play_category) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  group_by(down, distance_bucket, field_bucket) |>
  mutate(prob = n / sum(n))
state_probs
```

```{r}

# Visualize
ggplot(state_probs, aes(x = play_category, y = prob, fill = play_category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_grid(down ~ distance_bucket) +
  labs(
    title = "Run vs Pass by Down and Distance",
    x = "Play Type",
    y = "Probability"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}

# Probabilities by state without field bucket
state_probs_2 <- duke_plays %>%
  group_by(down, distance_bucket, play_category) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  group_by(down, distance_bucket) |>
  mutate(prob = n / sum(n))
state_probs_2
```

```{r}

# Looking at the outcomes of these states (play type, downs, distance)
state_outcomes_data <- duke_possession |>
  arrange(game_id, drive_id, drive_play_number) |>
  group_by(game_id, drive_id) |>
  mutate(
    next_play_type = lead(play_type)
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(play_type %in% c(
    "Rush", "Rushing Touchdown",
    "Pass Reception", "Passing Touchdown",
    "Pass Incompletion", "Sack"
  )) |>
  mutate(
    # Run/Pass state
    play_category = case_when(
      play_type %in% c("Rush", "Rushing Touchdown") ~ "Run",
      play_type %in% c("Pass Reception", "Passing Touchdown", "Pass Incompletion", "Sack") ~ "Pass"
    ),

    # Distance bucket
    distance_bucket = case_when(
      distance <= 3 ~ "short",
      distance <= 7 ~ "medium",
      TRUE ~ "long"
    ),

    # Same-play outcomes
    td = ifelse(grepl("Touchdown", play_type), 1, 0),
    first_down_conv = ifelse(new_series == 1, 1, 0),
    turnover_flag = ifelse(turnover == 1, 1, 0),
    punt_flag = ifelse(grepl("Punt", next_play_type), 1, 0),
    fg_attempt_flag = ifelse(grepl("Field Goal", next_play_type), 1, 0)
  )

state_outcomes <- state_outcomes_data |>
  group_by(play_category, down, distance_bucket) |>
  summarise(
    n_plays = n(),
    avg_yards = mean(yards_gained, na.rm = TRUE),
    td_rate = mean(td, na.rm = TRUE),
    first_down_rate = mean(first_down_conv, na.rm = TRUE),
    turnover_rate = mean(turnover_flag, na.rm = TRUE),
    punt_rate = mean(punt_flag, na.rm = TRUE),
    fg_attempt_rate = mean(fg_attempt_flag, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

state_outcomes
```

```{r}

# Plot the outcomes
ggplot(state_outcomes,
       aes(x = distance_bucket, y = first_down_rate, fill = play_category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~down) +
  labs(
    title = "First Down Conversion Rate",
    x = "Distance",
    y = "Conversion Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(state_outcomes,
       aes(x = distance_bucket, y = turnover_rate, fill = play_category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~down) +
  labs(
    title = "Turnover Rate",
    x = "Distance",
    y = "Turnover Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(state_outcomes,
       aes(x = distance_bucket, y = punt_rate, fill = play_category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~down) +
  labs(
    title = "Punt Probability (Next Play)",
    x = "Distance",
    y = "Punt Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(state_outcomes,
       aes(x = distance_bucket, y = fg_attempt_rate, fill = play_category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~down) +
  labs(
    title = "Field Goal Attempt Probability (Next Play)",
    x = "Distance",
    y = "FG Attempt Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
